opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on pullbacks toward 195-199 that hold above 185; target 225 (prior resistance and approximate 200-day MA area).
opportunities.rationale: Accenture gapped ~+4% on Mar 19 earnings (high-180s to 203.55), confirming solid Q2 FY2026 with AI and cloud consulting momentum. Latest close ~$197.55 on Mar 30, holding above $185 pre-earnings low. Stop at $185 not hit since entry (QG3 pass). TP at $225 not hit (QG4 pass). R:R from $199 midpoint to $225 vs $185 ~1:1.9. Invalidation: daily close below $185.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance ACN historical prices Mar 19 and Mar 30 2026
